title: coryphantha ottonis
intro: Coryphantha ottonis, also known as the Strophocactus ottonis or Living Rock, is a species of cactus native to Mexico. This cactus has been found to have medicinal properties due to its high content of alkaloids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Coryphantha ottonis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. In traditional medicine, the plant is typically used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the plant's stems and flowers.
